name: Western Union
description_short: Western Union at 1320 US-290, Elgin, TX 78621 is open 8:00 AM – 8:00 PM daily. Call +1 800-903-7490.
description_long: This Western Union location functions as a local agent for the Western Union money transfer network. Typical services at branded agent locations include sending and receiving domestic and international wire transfers, purchasing money orders, and making bill payments. Specific services, hours, and fees vary by location — contact the store directly using the phone number above for current availability.
pros: Access to 30,000 surcharge-free CO-OP ATMs nationwide plus 5,600 shared branch locations
Not-for-profit credit union structure means lower fees and competitive rates compared to for-profit banks
Extended banking hours including Saturday morning service at most branches
Both lobby and drive-through services available at 4 of 6 locations
Main office in Broken Arrow open 7:30am-5:30pm weekdays with drive-through service
Multiple conveniently located branches across Tulsa metropolitan area
cons: Membership limited to Oklahoma residents/employees in Tulsa-area service territory
Two locations (Downtown Tulsa and West Tulsa) lack drive-through service and on-site ATMs
Limited branch network of only 6 locations compared to regional/national banks
No information provided about specific loan products, rates, or membership eligibility requirements
Smaller institution may have fewer digital banking features than larger credit unions
best_for: Oklahoma residents in the Tulsa metropolitan area seeking local, member-owned banking
Individuals employed by WSFCU-affiliated employers who qualify for membership
Consumers who prioritize credit union principles and lower fees over extensive national branch networks
Members of the Broken Arrow, Bixby, Okmulgee, and Owasso communities
diagnosis: Western Sun Federal Credit Union is best for Oklahoma residents in the Tulsa area who want member-owned banking with no-fee ATM access nationwide. The main caveat is limited geographic service territory—membership and full branch access are restricted to the Oklahoma/Tulsa region, making it unsuitable for consumers outside this area or those requiring extensive multi-state branch networks.
services: Access to 30,000 CO-OP surcharge-free ATMs nationwide
Shared branching access to 5,600 credit union service centers
Telephone banking (customer service phone lines provided)
Saturday morning lobby and drive-through hours at select branches
meta_title: Western Sun — Credit Union in Broken Arrow, OK | CreditDoc
meta_description: Western Sun — NCUA-insured credit union in Broken Arrow, OK. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
